cards.name: Ashroot Initiate
cards.rulesText: When Ashroot Initiate enters, you may mill a card. If a land card was milled this way, you gain 2 life.

art.prompt: A young forest druid kneeling beside glowing roots, fantasy card art

cards.notes: Starter example card for testing the schema.

cards.name: Unwritten Warning
cards.rulesText: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}.

art.prompt: A mage interrupting glowing runes before they finish forming, fantasy card art
